intake.user_request: Execute all 7 leverage audit phases as a fresh active pass: source-headers, tree-sitter-verify, export-edges, what-imports-fix, rag-search-constraint, viz-fields, ai-truncation.

classification.plan_type_rationale: 7 ordered audit phases with light dependency chain. Each phase is a discrete verification/measurement task. Medium scope, no architectural overhaul, no schema changes.

in_scope: Phase 1: source-headers — re-run populate-coderef --source-headers, measure coverage delta
Phase 2: tree-sitter-verify — verify field extraction correctness for all element types
Phase 3: export-edges — audit export relationship accuracy in graph.json
Phase 4: what-imports-fix — fix any broken import resolution in scanner output
Phase 5: rag-search-constraint — test RAG search with --constraint flag
Phase 6: viz-fields — validate visualization field output from graph
Phase 7: ai-truncation — verify smart truncation behavior in context output
out_of_scope: RAG index rebuild with Ollama (owned by Instance 1 / dispatch-009)

constraints: Test suite must remain green (1495 passing) at all phase boundaries
Do not touch dispatch-008, dispatch-007, dispatch-009 — those belong to Instance 1
Phases are audits/measurements — commit only if fixes are required
